title: The line of women, hands open
subtitle: A visualisation for releasing inherited money fear and choosing a new relationship with abundance.
excerpt: A ten-minute visualisation for when the family money pattern weighs on you. Picture the women who came before you, their fear of lack, and the moment you choose to receive differently.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education, developed for the generational money pattern theme of Week 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Draws on ancestral release visualisation techniques from the public-domain contemplative tradition.

content.text: A ten-minute visualisation for releasing the weight of inherited money fear. The image draws on the women who came before you, then hands you a choice they couldn't make for themselves.
Sit or lie down. Close your eyes. Take three slow breaths to arrive in the room.

Picture yourself standing in an open space. Behind you, stretching back further than you can see, is a line of women. Your mother. Her mother. The women before her. Each one with her hands slightly closed, held at her sides.

Notice what their closed hands mean. Not stinginess. Fear. The fear that if you open your hands, what's there will leave. The fear of not enough. The fear of wanting too much. They passed it forward without meaning to.
Now picture yourself turning to face forward. The line behind you holds still. In front of you is open space, no queue, no pattern, no instruction. Just the choice.
Open your hands in the image. Palms up. Not grasping, not clenched. Just open. This is the gesture that says: I can receive. I am not afraid of what comes.
Hold the image of your open hands for a minute. Notice whether the old reflex to close them shows up. If it does, open them again. You don't need to argue with the reflex. Just keep choosing open.
When you're ready, open your eyes and write one sentence: what you are choosing to receive that they couldn't.

Original to homemade.education. Built alongside the generational money pattern work in Week 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program by Rebecca J Page. Ancestral release visualisations sit in a long public-domain quiet-practice tradition. This version is shaped for the inherited-fear pattern that the program works with.
